sources.source_name: KeyLoop authored everyday English corpus v1
sources.generation_script: authored for KeyLoop after the collected Gutenberg corpus failed quality gates; reviewed for level fit, ASCII purity, and natural modern usage
sources.notes: Modern everyday English sentences (daily life, work, study, travel, research) authored to complement the literary Gutenberg base corpus.

sources.source_name: VOA Learning English
sources.license: Public domain (U.S. federal government work; VOA original text only, wire-agency content excluded)
sources.notes: Modern graded articles written by VOA Learning English editors for English learners; broadcast framing and host sign-offs trimmed; Chinese paragraph translations authored for KeyLoop and reviewed.

sources.source_name: Tatoeba sentence pairs (English-Mandarin)
sources.notes: Native-speaker example sentences with Simplified Chinese translations; filtered through completeness, word-count, and per-level reading-vocabulary gates, leveled by lowest passing vocabulary level.

entries.text: Can you send me the photo later?
entries.translation_zh: 你晚点能把照片发给我吗？
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: I left my keys on the kitchen table.
entries.translation_zh: 我把钥匙落在厨房桌上了。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Let's meet at the coffee shop at three.
entries.translation_zh: 我们三点在咖啡店见吧。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The bus was late again this morning.
entries.translation_zh: 今天早上公交车又晚点了。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: She likes to cook dinner with her father.
entries.translation_zh: 她喜欢和爸爸一起做晚饭。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Please turn off the lights before you leave.
entries.translation_zh: 离开前请把灯关掉。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: My phone battery is almost dead.
entries.translation_zh: 我手机快没电了。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: We watched a funny movie last night.
entries.translation_zh: 我们昨晚看了一部很好笑的电影。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Do you want some milk in your tea?
entries.translation_zh: 你的茶里要加点牛奶吗？
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: He walks his dog in the park every day.
entries.translation_zh: 他每天都在公园里遛狗。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The store is open until nine every day.
entries.translation_zh: 这家店每天营业到九点。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: I need to buy a gift for my friend.
entries.translation_zh: 我需要给朋友买份礼物。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: It looks like it will rain this afternoon.
entries.translation_zh: 看起来今天下午要下雨。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Could you open the window a little bit?
entries.translation_zh: 你能把窗户开一点吗？
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: They are moving to a new house next week.
entries.translation_zh: 他们下周要搬进新房子。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: This food has a little too much salt for me.
entries.translation_zh: 这食物对我来说盐放得有点多。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Don't forget to bring your water bottle.
entries.translation_zh: 别忘了带上你的水瓶。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The train station is ten minutes from here.
entries.translation_zh: 火车站离这里十分钟路程。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: I usually get up at seven on school days.
entries.translation_zh: 上学的日子我通常七点起床。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Her little brother is learning to ride a bike.
entries.translation_zh: 她的弟弟正在学骑自行车。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: We had rice and fish for lunch today.
entries.translation_zh: 我们今天午饭吃了米饭和鱼。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Can I use your phone for a minute?
entries.translation_zh: 我能用一下你的手机吗？
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The weather is perfect for a walk today.
entries.translation_zh: 今天的天气很适合散步。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: He scored two goals in the game yesterday.
entries.translation_zh: 他在昨天的比赛中进了两个球。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: My mother asked me to pick up some bread on my way home from school.
entries.translation_zh: 妈妈让我放学回家路上买点面包。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: We are planning a small party for my sister because she just finished her exams.
entries.translation_zh: 我们打算给妹妹办个小派对，因为她刚考完试。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The teacher said we should read the first two chapters before the next class.
entries.translation_zh: 老师说我们应该在下节课前读完前两章。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: I tried to call you twice last night, but your phone was turned off.
entries.translation_zh: 昨晚我给你打了两次电话，但你的手机关机了。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: If the weather is nice on Saturday, we can ride our bikes to the lake.
entries.translation_zh: 如果周六天气好，我们可以骑车去湖边。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: She keeps a small notebook to write down new words she learns every day.
entries.translation_zh: 她随身带个小本子，记下每天学到的新单词。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The supermarket near our house is having a big sale on fruit this week.
entries.translation_zh: 我们家附近的超市这周水果大减价。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: My grandfather likes to tell us stories about his life when he was young.
entries.translation_zh: 爷爷喜欢给我们讲他年轻时的故事。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Please remember to feed the cat and water the plants while we are away.
entries.translation_zh: 我们不在的时候，请记得喂猫和浇花。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: It took us almost two hours to clean the whole apartment this morning.
entries.translation_zh: 今天早上我们花了将近两个小时打扫整个公寓。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: He was so sleepy after practice that he went to bed right after dinner.
entries.translation_zh: 训练后他太困了，吃完晚饭就上床睡觉了。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The children built a small castle out of sand and were very proud of it.
entries.translation_zh: 孩子们用沙子堆了一座小城堡，非常自豪。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Could you help me carry these bags upstairs before you go out to play?
entries.translation_zh: 你出去玩之前能帮我把这些袋子搬上楼吗？
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: We missed the first ten minutes of the movie because of the heavy traffic.
entries.translation_zh: 因为堵车，我们错过了电影的前十分钟。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: My best friend moved to another city, but we still talk online every weekend.
entries.translation_zh: 我最好的朋友搬去了另一个城市，但我们每个周末还在网上聊天。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The doctor told him to drink more water and get at least eight hours of sleep.
entries.translation_zh: 医生让他多喝水，每天至少睡八个小时。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: I want to save some money this year so I can buy a new bicycle.
entries.translation_zh: 我今年想存点钱，好买一辆新自行车。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: There is a new student in our class, and she comes from a small town.
entries.translation_zh: 我们班来了个新同学，她来自一个小镇。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Father fixed the broken chair in the garden while Mother cleaned the front door.
entries.translation_zh: 爸爸修好了花园里坏掉的椅子，妈妈把前门擦干净了。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: You should bring an umbrella because the radio said it might rain later today.
entries.translation_zh: 你应该带把伞，广播说今天晚些时候可能下雨。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Our team practiced hard for weeks, so everyone was happy when we won.
entries.translation_zh: 我们队努力训练了好几周，所以赢的时候大家都很开心。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: She turned off the television and went to bed because she had an early class.
entries.translation_zh: 她关掉电视去睡觉了，因为第二天有早课。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The library was so quiet that I could hear the clock ticking on the wall.
entries.translation_zh: 图书馆安静得我能听到墙上钟表的滴答声。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: After dinner we played cards with our cousins until it was time to go home.
entries.translation_zh: 晚饭后我们和表兄妹打牌，一直玩到该回家的时候。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: When I got home from school, I found that my little sister had already finished her homework and was helping our mother set the table for dinner.
entries.translation_zh: 我放学回家时，发现妹妹已经写完作业，正在帮妈妈摆桌子准备晚饭。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: My father showed me how to plant vegetables last spring, and this summer we got enough from the garden to share with everyone near our house.
entries.translation_zh: 去年春天爸爸教我种菜，今年夏天我们从园子里收获的蔬菜多到可以分给家附近的每个人。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The school trip was canceled because of the storm, so the teachers showed us a film in the hall and let us play games in the afternoon.
entries.translation_zh: 学校的郊游因暴风雨取消了，所以老师们在礼堂给我们放了电影，下午还让我们玩游戏。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Every Sunday morning my family walks to the market near the river, where we buy fresh vegetables and sometimes stop for hot noodles at a small shop.
entries.translation_zh: 每个周日早上，我们全家步行去河边的市场买新鲜蔬菜，有时还会在一家小店停下来吃热面条。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: I was nervous about speaking in front of the whole class, but after the first minute I relaxed and even started to enjoy telling my story.
entries.translation_zh: 在全班面前讲话让我很紧张，但开始一分钟后我就放松了，甚至开始享受讲自己的故事。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: My grandmother says that when she was a girl, the town had no bus at all, and she had to walk a long way to school in every season.
entries.translation_zh: 奶奶说她小时候镇上根本没有公交车，无论什么季节她都得走很远的路去上学。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: We spent the whole afternoon looking for the cat, and in the end we found her sleeping quietly in a basket of clean clothes upstairs.
entries.translation_zh: 我们找了一下午的猫，最后发现她正安静地睡在楼上一篮干净衣服里。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The new sports center near our school has a swimming pool, two basketball courts, and a running track, so everyone wants to go there after class.
entries.translation_zh: 我们学校附近新建的体育中心有游泳池、两个篮球场和一条跑道，所以大家放学后都想去那里。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: If you finish your homework before six, we can watch the football game together and order some chicken and rice from the place you like.
entries.translation_zh: 如果你六点前写完作业，我们就可以一起看足球比赛，再从你喜欢的那家店点鸡肉和米饭。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: On the first day of the holiday, we put bread and fruit in a bag, took the early train to the sea, and played on the beach until the evening.
entries.translation_zh: 假期第一天，我们把面包和水果装进包里，坐早班火车去海边，在沙滩上一直玩到傍晚。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: She practiced the piano every evening for a month, and when she finally played the song for her teacher, he smiled and clapped his hands.
entries.translation_zh: 她每天晚上练一个小时钢琴，坚持了一个月，当她终于给老师弹那首曲子时，老师笑着鼓起掌来。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The little shop on the corner sells the best ice cream in town, and in summer there is always a long line outside the door.
entries.translation_zh: 街角的小店卖全城最好吃的冰淇淋，夏天门口总是排着长队。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: My brother lost his bus card on the way home, so he had to walk for an hour, and he was very hungry when he arrived.
entries.translation_zh: 我哥哥在回家路上丢了公交卡，只好走了一个小时，到家时已经饿坏了。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Our teacher asked each of us to bring one old book to class so that we could open a small library by the window.
entries.translation_zh: 老师让我们每人带一本旧书到班里，这样我们就能在窗边开一个小图书角。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: It snowed all night, and in the morning the whole street was white, so the children ran outside to make a snowman before breakfast.
entries.translation_zh: 雪下了一整夜，早上整条街都白了，孩子们早饭前就跑出去堆雪人。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: I wanted to make my mother happy on her birthday, so I got up early, washed the dishes, and made her favorite breakfast.
entries.translation_zh: 我想在妈妈生日那天让她开心，所以早早起床洗了碗，还做了她最爱吃的早餐。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The game was almost over when our team got the ball, and in the last minute we scored the goal that won the match.
entries.translation_zh: 比赛快结束时我们队拿到了球，在最后一分钟打进了制胜一球。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: During the summer holiday I read three books, learned to swim a little better, and helped my uncle paint the fence around his garden.
entries.translation_zh: 暑假期间我读了三本书，游泳学得更好了一点，还帮叔叔给他家花园的栅栏刷了漆。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: When the lights went out during the storm, we lit candles, sat together in the living room, and told stories until the power came back.
entries.translation_zh: 暴风雨导致停电时，我们点上蜡烛，一起坐在客厅里讲故事，直到来电。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: He saved his pocket money for half a year because he wanted to buy a present for his mother instead of asking his father for help.
entries.translation_zh: 他攒了半年零花钱，因为他想自己给妈妈买礼物，而不是向爸爸求助。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The museum near the station is free on Friday afternoons, so our class is going there next week to see the old ships and maps.
entries.translation_zh: 车站附近的博物馆周五下午免费开放，所以我们班下周要去那里看古船和地图。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: My cousin is staying with us this month, and every evening after dinner we play table tennis in the yard until it gets dark.
entries.translation_zh: 我表弟这个月住在我们家，每天晚饭后我们都在院子里打乒乓球，直到天黑。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: She was afraid of dogs when she was small, but now she has a big friendly one that follows her everywhere she goes.
entries.translation_zh: 她小时候怕狗，但现在养了一只友善的大狗，走到哪儿都跟着她。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: We planted a small tree in front of the house five years ago, and now it is tall enough to give us shade in summer.
entries.translation_zh: 五年前我们在房前种了一棵小树，现在它已经高到能在夏天为我们遮荫了。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The meeting has been moved to Thursday morning.
entries.translation_zh: 会议改到周四上午了。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: I finally finished my report at midnight.
entries.translation_zh: 我终于在午夜写完了报告。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: She applied for a part-time job last week.
entries.translation_zh: 她上周申请了一份兼职工作。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The price of coffee here is quite reasonable.
entries.translation_zh: 这里的咖啡价格相当合理。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Please check your email before the class starts.
entries.translation_zh: 上课前请查看你的邮箱。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: He often works late during the busy season.
entries.translation_zh: 旺季的时候他经常加班到很晚。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Our flight was delayed by almost two hours.
entries.translation_zh: 我们的航班延误了将近两个小时。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: I'm trying to spend less time on my phone.
entries.translation_zh: 我在努力减少看手机的时间。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The new shopping center opens next month.
entries.translation_zh: 新的购物中心下个月开业。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Could you explain this question one more time?
entries.translation_zh: 你能把这道题再讲一遍吗？
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: They offered her a position in the sales team.
entries.translation_zh: 他们给了她销售团队的一个职位。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: My laptop needs to be repaired again.
entries.translation_zh: 我的笔记本电脑又得修了。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: We should book the tickets as early as possible.
entries.translation_zh: 我们应该尽早订票。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The lecture covered the history of modern art.
entries.translation_zh: 这次讲座讲了现代艺术史。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: He gave up smoking for the sake of his health.
entries.translation_zh: 为了健康他戒了烟。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The hotel provides free breakfast for all guests.
entries.translation_zh: 这家酒店为所有客人提供免费早餐。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: I prefer reading news online to buying newspapers.
entries.translation_zh: 比起买报纸，我更喜欢在网上看新闻。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Her presentation impressed everyone in the room.
entries.translation_zh: 她的演讲给在场的所有人留下了深刻印象。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The library extends its hours during exam weeks.
entries.translation_zh: 考试周图书馆会延长开放时间。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: You can cancel the order within twenty-four hours.
entries.translation_zh: 你可以在二十四小时内取消订单。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: This app helps me manage my daily expenses.
entries.translation_zh: 这个应用帮我管理日常开支。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The traffic downtown is very heavy on Friday nights.
entries.translation_zh: 周五晚上市中心的交通非常拥堵。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: He helps at the animal center every weekend.
entries.translation_zh: 他每个周末都在动物中心帮忙。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The company plans to hire more engineers this year.
entries.translation_zh: 公司计划今年招聘更多工程师。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: I have to prepare a short speech for the welcome party at the end of the month.
entries.translation_zh: 我得为月底的欢迎会准备一个简短的发言。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The customer service agent promised that the package would arrive within three working days.
entries.translation_zh: 客服人员承诺包裹会在三个工作日内送达。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: She decided to take an online course to improve her writing skills during the holiday.
entries.translation_zh: 她决定假期上一门网课来提高写作能力。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The restaurant was fully booked, so we ended up trying the new place across the street.
entries.translation_zh: 那家餐厅订满了，所以我们最后去试了街对面的新店。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: If you want to join the gym, they are offering a discount for students this month.
entries.translation_zh: 如果你想办健身房会员，他们这个月对学生有折扣。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: My roommate said we should share the housework instead of fighting about it every week.
entries.translation_zh: 我室友说我们应该分担家务，而不是每周为此吵架。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The manager asked everyone to submit their weekly reports before Friday afternoon.
entries.translation_zh: 经理要求所有人在周五下午之前提交周报。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: It turns out that the noise upstairs was just my neighbor moving his furniture around.
entries.translation_zh: 原来楼上的噪音只是邻居在挪家具。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: I compared several brands online before deciding which washing machine to buy.
entries.translation_zh: 我在网上比较了几个品牌，才决定买哪台洗衣机。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The doctor suggested that I take a break from running until my knee fully recovers.
entries.translation_zh: 医生建议我暂停跑步，直到膝盖完全恢复。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: We were supposed to meet at the cinema, but he went to the wrong one by mistake.
entries.translation_zh: 我们本来约好在电影院见面，但他错去了另一家。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The university offers free counseling services to students who feel stressed during exams.
entries.translation_zh: 大学为考试期间感到压力的学生提供免费心理咨询。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: My internet connection kept dropping during the video call, which was really annoying.
entries.translation_zh: 视频通话时我的网络一直断，真的很烦人。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: They raised the rent again this year, so we are thinking about moving to a smaller place.
entries.translation_zh: 今年房租又涨了，所以我们在考虑搬到小一点的地方。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: He spent the whole weekend fixing his car instead of coming to the picnic with us.
entries.translation_zh: 他整个周末都在修车，没跟我们一起去野餐。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The new policy allows employees to work from home two days a week.
entries.translation_zh: 新政策允许员工每周在家办公两天。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: I always make a shopping list before going to the supermarket so I don't overspend.
entries.translation_zh: 去超市前我总会列购物清单，以免超支。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The staff on the plane helped me find space for my bags above the seat.
entries.translation_zh: 机上工作人员帮我在座位上方找到了放包的空间。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: She has been saving part of her salary every month for a trip to Europe next year.
entries.translation_zh: 她每个月都存下一部分工资，准备明年去欧洲旅行。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The presentation went well, although I was extremely nervous at the beginning.
entries.translation_zh: 演讲进行得很顺利，虽然一开始我特别紧张。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Our professor encourages us to ask questions whenever we don't understand the material.
entries.translation_zh: 教授鼓励我们一有不懂的地方就提问。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The weather forecast says the temperature will drop sharply over the weekend.
entries.translation_zh: 天气预报说周末气温会骤降。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: I removed the file by mistake, but my workmate had saved another copy.
entries.translation_zh: 我误删了文件，但同事保存了另一份副本。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The volunteers spent the morning cleaning up the beach and collected ten bags of trash.
entries.translation_zh: 志愿者们花了一上午清理海滩，收集了十袋垃圾。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: After comparing the prices and reviews of several hotels, we finally chose one near the city center because it was close to the subway and included breakfast.
entries.translation_zh: 比较了几家酒店的价格和评价后，我们最终选了市中心附近的一家，因为它离地铁近还含早餐。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The training session this morning lasted longer than expected, so the team decided to order lunch to the office instead of going out to the restaurant.
entries.translation_zh: 今天上午的培训比预期时间长，所以团队决定点外卖到办公室，而不是出去下馆子。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: When my computer suddenly stopped working the night before the deadline, my roommate lent me hers so that I could finish the assignment on time.
entries.translation_zh: 截止日期前一晚我的电脑突然坏了，室友把她的借给我，我才得以按时完成作业。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The city has opened several new bike lanes this year, hoping to encourage more people to cycle to work instead of driving their cars.
entries.translation_zh: 今年市里新开通了几条自行车道，希望鼓励更多人骑车上班而不是开车。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Although the museum ticket was a little expensive, the special exhibition about ancient Egypt was definitely worth the money and the long wait in line.
entries.translation_zh: 虽然博物馆门票有点贵，但那场关于古埃及的特展绝对值回票价和漫长的排队等待。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: I signed up for the morning yoga class because the evening sessions are always full, and I actually enjoy starting my day with some exercise now.
entries.translation_zh: 我报了早上的瑜伽课，因为晚上的课总是满员，而现在我真的很享受用运动开启一天。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The landlord agreed to repaint the walls and fix the heating before we move in, which made the apartment much more attractive to us.
entries.translation_zh: 房东同意在我们入住前重新粉刷墙壁并修好暖气，这让这套公寓对我们更有吸引力了。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: During the job interview, she was asked to describe a difficult problem she had solved, and her honest answer left a strong impression on the panel.
entries.translation_zh: 面试时她被要求描述一个她解决过的难题，她诚恳的回答给面试官留下了深刻印象。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: My parents have finally learned how to make video calls, so now we talk face to face every Sunday even though we live in different cities.
entries.translation_zh: 我父母终于学会了视频通话，现在虽然我们住在不同城市，但每个周日都能面对面聊天。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The conference was moved online at the last minute, and to everyone's surprise, more people attended than in any previous year.
entries.translation_zh: 会议在最后一刻改为线上举行，令所有人惊讶的是，参加人数比以往任何一年都多。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: He missed the last train home after the concert, so he shared a taxi with two strangers who happened to live in the same neighborhood.
entries.translation_zh: 演唱会结束后他错过了末班车，于是和两个碰巧住在同一街区的陌生人拼了出租车。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The store refused to give me a refund at first, but after I showed them the receipt and the photos, they apologized and returned my money.
entries.translation_zh: 商店起初拒绝退款，但在我出示收据和照片后，他们道了歉并退了钱。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: We planned to climb the mountain on Saturday, but the heavy rain forced us to change our plans and visit the hot springs instead.
entries.translation_zh: 我们原计划周六爬山，但大雨迫使我们改变计划，改去泡了温泉。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: She joined the company as an intern three years ago, and through hard work she has become one of the youngest team leaders in the department.
entries.translation_zh: 三年前她以实习生身份加入公司，凭借努力工作已成为部门里最年轻的组长之一。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The neighborhood committee organized a second-hand market last weekend, where residents sold old books, clothes, and furniture at very low prices.
entries.translation_zh: 社区委员会上周末组织了一场二手市集，居民们以很低的价格出售旧书、衣服和家具。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: I have been learning to cook from online videos this year, and although I burned a few dishes at first, my friends now actually enjoy my dinners.
entries.translation_zh: 今年我一直跟着网上的视频学做饭，虽然一开始烧糊了几道菜，但现在朋友们真的很喜欢吃我做的晚餐。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The express delivery was supposed to arrive on Monday, but because of the holiday rush, I didn't receive my package until Thursday evening.
entries.translation_zh: 快递本该周一到，但由于节日高峰，我直到周四晚上才收到包裹。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: If you register for the marathon before the end of this month, you will receive a free running shirt and a discount on next year's entry fee.
entries.translation_zh: 如果你在本月底前报名马拉松，将获得一件免费跑步衫和明年报名费的折扣。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The professor reminded us that the essay should be based on our own research and that copying from the internet would lead to serious consequences.
entries.translation_zh: 教授提醒我们，论文必须基于自己的研究，从网上抄袭会导致严重后果。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: My sister's flight lands at six in the morning, so I set two alarms to make sure I wake up in time to pick her up.
entries.translation_zh: 我姐姐的航班早上六点降落，所以我定了两个闹钟，确保能及时醒来去接她。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The cafe on the corner changed its menu last month, and their new lemon cake has quickly become the most popular dessert in the area.
entries.translation_zh: 街角的咖啡馆上个月换了菜单，他们新出的柠檬蛋糕很快成了这一带最受欢迎的甜点。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: After working overtime for two weeks, he finally took a day off and spent the whole afternoon sleeping and watching old movies at home.
entries.translation_zh: 连续加班两周后，他终于休了一天假，整个下午都在家睡觉、看老电影。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The students organized a small concert to raise money for the local children's hospital, and the tickets sold out within two days.
entries.translation_zh: 学生们组织了一场小型音乐会为当地儿童医院筹款，门票两天内就卖光了。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: I always keep a small bag packed with basic things like a toothbrush and a charger, so I am ready for sudden business trips.
entries.translation_zh: 我总是备着一个装有牙刷、充电器等基本用品的小包，以便随时应对突然的出差。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The committee approved the budget without further debate.
entries.translation_zh: 委员会未经进一步讨论就批准了预算。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Remote work has transformed how teams communicate.
entries.translation_zh: 远程办公改变了团队的沟通方式。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Her argument sounded strong but had little solid evidence.
entries.translation_zh: 她的论点听起来有力，但缺乏可靠的证据。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The company launched an investigation into the complaint.
entries.translation_zh: 公司针对这起投诉展开了调查。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: House prices outside the city continue to rise.
entries.translation_zh: 城外的房价持续上涨。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: He negotiated a better contract with the supplier.
entries.translation_zh: 他和供应商谈成了一份更好的合同。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The article analyzes recent trends in consumer behavior.
entries.translation_zh: 这篇文章分析了消费者行为的最新趋势。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Their new company received investment from several firms.
entries.translation_zh: 他们的新公司获得了几家公司的投资。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The new regulation takes effect at the start of July.
entries.translation_zh: 新规定七月初开始生效。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: She deals with customer complaints in a calm and patient way.
entries.translation_zh: 她以冷静耐心的方式处理顾客投诉。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The data suggests a gradual shift in public opinion.
entries.translation_zh: 数据表明公众舆论正在逐渐转变。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Volunteers distributed supplies to the affected families.
entries.translation_zh: 志愿者向受灾家庭分发了物资。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The lecture examined the causes of urban poverty.
entries.translation_zh: 讲座探讨了城市贫困的成因。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: His proposal was rejected due to budget concerns.
entries.translation_zh: 他的提案因预算问题被否决了。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The airline upgraded my seat without extra charge.
entries.translation_zh: 航空公司免费给我升了舱。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Researchers observed a significant drop in pollution levels.
entries.translation_zh: 研究人员观察到污染水平显著下降。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The museum digitized thousands of historical documents.
entries.translation_zh: 博物馆将数千份历史文件数字化了。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Sales figures exceeded expectations in the third quarter.
entries.translation_zh: 第三季度的销售数据超出了预期。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The union asked for better and safe conditions for factory workers.
entries.translation_zh: 工会要求为工厂工人提供更好且安全的工作条件。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Critics liked the film because it tells an honest story.
entries.translation_zh: 影评人喜欢这部电影，因为它讲述了一个真诚的故事。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The app collects feedback through short weekly surveys.
entries.translation_zh: 这款应用通过每周简短的问卷收集反馈。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: A balanced diet contributes to long-term health.
entries.translation_zh: 均衡的饮食有益于长期健康。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The bank tightened its requirements for personal loans.
entries.translation_zh: 银行收紧了个人贷款的要求。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Their research team published the findings last month.
entries.translation_zh: 他们的研究团队上个月发表了这些发现。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The government announced a new program to support small businesses struggling with rising costs.
entries.translation_zh: 政府宣布了一项新计划，扶持艰难应对成本上涨的小企业。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Despite the initial criticism, the updated design proved far more practical for daily use.
entries.translation_zh: 尽管最初受到批评，更新后的设计被证明在日常使用中实用得多。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The study found that students who sleep well generally perform better on difficult exams.
entries.translation_zh: 研究发现，睡眠充足的学生在难度大的考试中通常表现更好。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Our department is seeking candidates with strong communication skills and relevant project experience.
entries.translation_zh: 我们部门正在寻找沟通能力强并具有相关项目经验的候选人。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The documentary explores how a small fishing village adapted to dramatic environmental changes.
entries.translation_zh: 这部纪录片探讨了一个小渔村如何适应剧烈的环境变化。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: He admitted that the schedule was too ambitious and agreed to extend the deadline.
entries.translation_zh: 他承认日程安排过于激进，并同意延长截止日期。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The conference brought together experts from different fields to discuss sustainable city planning.
entries.translation_zh: 这次会议汇聚了不同领域的专家，共同探讨可持续的城市规划。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Online reviews influence purchasing decisions far more than traditional advertising does today.
entries.translation_zh: 如今网上评价对购买决策的影响远超传统广告。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The hospital introduced an electronic system to reduce errors in patient records.
entries.translation_zh: 医院引入了电子系统，以减少病历中的错误。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Many graduates struggle to find affordable housing in cities where the best jobs are located.
entries.translation_zh: 许多毕业生很难在好工作集中的城市找到负担得起的住房。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The author argues that technology should serve human needs rather than replace human judgment.
entries.translation_zh: 作者认为技术应当服务于人的需求，而不是取代人的判断。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Employees are encouraged to report safety issues without fear of negative consequences.
entries.translation_zh: 公司鼓励员工报告安全问题，而不必担心负面后果。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The charity depends mainly on monthly gifts from a small group of faithful members.
entries.translation_zh: 这家慈善机构主要依靠一小群忠实成员的每月捐赠。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: After reviewing the evidence, the committee concluded that the original decision was fair.
entries.translation_zh: 审查证据后，委员会得出结论，原来的决定是公正的。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The rapid growth of food delivery services has changed the restaurant industry permanently.
entries.translation_zh: 外卖服务的迅速发展永久地改变了餐饮业。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: She balanced her full-time job with evening classes to earn a degree in accounting.
entries.translation_zh: 她一边做全职工作，一边上夜校，攻读会计学位。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The negotiation failed because neither side was willing to compromise on the key issues.
entries.translation_zh: 谈判失败了，因为双方都不愿在关键问题上让步。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Public libraries are expanding their digital collections to meet changing reader habits.
entries.translation_zh: 公共图书馆正在扩充数字馆藏，以适应读者习惯的变化。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The survey revealed that most residents support the plan to expand the subway network.
entries.translation_zh: 调查显示，大多数居民支持扩建地铁网络的计划。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Climate experts warn that extreme weather events are becoming more frequent and severe.
entries.translation_zh: 气候专家警告说，极端天气事件正变得越来越频繁和严重。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The firm offers flexible schedules to help employees balance work and family responsibilities.
entries.translation_zh: 公司提供弹性工作时间，帮助员工平衡工作和家庭责任。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: His latest book examines the hidden costs of convenience in the digital economy.
entries.translation_zh: 他的新书审视了数字经济中便利背后的隐性代价。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The committee will evaluate each application based on merit rather than personal connections.
entries.translation_zh: 委员会将根据能力而非人脉来评估每份申请。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Renewable energy now accounts for a growing share of the country's electricity production.
entries.translation_zh: 可再生能源在该国发电量中所占的比例越来越大。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The report concludes that investing in public transportation not only reduces traffic congestion but also improves air quality and creates thousands of stable jobs for local communities.
entries.translation_zh: 报告的结论是，投资公共交通不仅能缓解交通拥堵，还能改善空气质量，并为当地社区创造数千个稳定的工作岗位。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Although electric cars are becoming more affordable every year, many drivers still hesitate to switch because charging stations remain scarce outside the major cities.
entries.translation_zh: 尽管电动汽车一年比一年便宜，许多司机仍对换车犹豫不决，因为大城市以外的充电站仍然稀缺。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The university decided to record all introductory lectures and make them freely available online, allowing students to review difficult concepts at their own pace.
entries.translation_zh: 大学决定录制所有入门课程并免费放到网上，让学生能按自己的节奏复习难懂的概念。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: When the factory announced it would close at the end of the year, the city offered tax breaks to attract new employers and retrain the affected workers.
entries.translation_zh: 工厂宣布将于年底关闭后，市政府提供税收优惠以吸引新雇主，并对受影响的工人进行再培训。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The research team spent three years following five hundred families to understand how early reading habits influence children's performance throughout primary school.
entries.translation_zh: 研究团队花了三年时间跟踪五百个家庭，以了解早期阅读习惯如何影响孩子整个小学阶段的表现。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Critics of the new policy argue that it places too heavy a burden on small businesses while offering little protection to the workers it claims to help.
entries.translation_zh: 新政策的批评者认为，它给小企业带来了过重的负担，却几乎没有为它声称要帮助的工人提供保护。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The exhibition combines photographs, letters, and recorded interviews to tell the story of the families who rebuilt the neighborhood after the flood.
entries.translation_zh: 展览通过照片、书信和访谈录音，讲述了洪水过后重建社区的家庭的故事。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: As more people choose to work remotely, smaller towns with good internet and affordable housing are experiencing population growth for the first time in decades.
entries.translation_zh: 随着越来越多的人选择远程工作，拥有良好网络和低价住房的小城镇几十年来首次出现人口增长。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The airline said sorry for the long delay and offered free meals, hotel rooms, and a full refund for those who chose to cancel.
entries.translation_zh: 航空公司为长时间延误道歉，提供免费餐食和酒店房间，选择取消行程的乘客可获全额退款。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Her thesis examines how social media platforms shape political discussion, drawing on interviews with users from three very different age groups.
entries.translation_zh: 她的论文研究社交媒体平台如何塑造政治讨论，依据的是对三个差异很大的年龄群体用户的访谈。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The company's decision to replace plastic packaging with recycled paper increased costs slightly, but customer loyalty improved enough to justify the change.
entries.translation_zh: 公司用再生纸取代塑料包装的决定让成本略有上升，但客户忠诚度的提升足以证明这一改变是值得的。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Local farmers formed a cooperative to sell directly to city restaurants, cutting out middlemen and earning nearly twice what they received before.
entries.translation_zh: 当地农民成立合作社，直接向城市餐厅供货，省去了中间商，收入几乎是以前的两倍。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The committee recommended stricter inspections of older buildings after the survey revealed that many had not been checked in more than a decade.
entries.translation_zh: 调查显示许多老旧建筑十多年未经检查，因此委员会建议对其进行更严格的检查。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Despite years of warnings from engineers, the bridge repairs were repeatedly postponed until the city finally closed it to heavy vehicles last winter.
entries.translation_zh: 尽管工程师们警告多年，大桥维修仍被一再推迟，直到去年冬天市政府终于禁止重型车辆通行。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The program connects retired experts with young business owners, giving the new companies practical advice while letting the older generation share their experience.
entries.translation_zh: 该项目让退休专家与年轻创业者建立联系，为新公司提供实用建议，也让老一辈得以分享经验。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Researchers discovered that the ancient trading route stretched far beyond what historians had assumed, connecting communities across the entire region.
entries.translation_zh: 研究人员发现，这条古代贸易路线的范围远超历史学家的设想，连接了整个地区的社群。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The city's experiment with free public transport on weekends attracted so many visitors to the downtown shops that officials are considering extending it.
entries.translation_zh: 该市周末免费公共交通的试验为市中心商铺吸引了大量顾客，官员们正考虑延长这一政策。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: After the documentary was shown on television, support for the wildlife park grew three times, allowing the staff to expand the rescue program and hire two animal doctors.
entries.translation_zh: 纪录片在电视播出后，对野生动物园的支持增长了三倍，工作人员得以扩大救助项目并聘请两名兽医。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The new management restructured the entire department, and although the process was painful, productivity and morale have clearly improved since then.
entries.translation_zh: 新管理层重组了整个部门，虽然过程痛苦，但此后生产效率和士气明显提高。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Economists disagree about the long-term effects of the policy, but most accept that it provided crucial relief to households during the crisis.
entries.translation_zh: 经济学家对该政策的长期影响看法不一，但大多数人承认它在危机期间为家庭提供了关键的纾困。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The startup's success came not from inventing new technology but from making existing tools simple enough for anyone to use without training.
entries.translation_zh: 这家初创公司的成功并非源于发明新技术，而是把现有工具做得足够简单，任何人无需培训即可使用。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The report urges schools to teach basic financial skills, noting that many young adults sign their first loan without understanding the interest terms.
entries.translation_zh: 报告敦促学校教授基本的理财技能，并指出许多年轻人在签下第一笔贷款时并不理解利息条款。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Following months of public consultation, the council revised the development plan to preserve the old market square and add more green space.
entries.translation_zh: 经过数月的公众咨询，市政会修订了开发计划，保留老市场广场并增加更多绿地。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The translation project recruited volunteers from twelve countries, and together they made the safety guidelines available in more than thirty languages.
entries.translation_zh: 这个翻译项目招募了来自十二个国家的志愿者，他们一起把安全指南翻译成三十多种语言。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The hypothesis was tested under controlled laboratory conditions.
entries.translation_zh: 该假设在受控的实验室条件下得到了检验。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Preliminary results indicate a strong correlation between the variables.
entries.translation_zh: 初步结果表明这些变量之间存在很强的相关性。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The methodology section requires substantial revision.
entries.translation_zh: 方法论部分需要大幅修改。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Funding constraints limited the scope of the experiment.
entries.translation_zh: 经费限制缩小了实验的范围。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Her dissertation challenges several established assumptions.
entries.translation_zh: 她的博士论文挑战了几个既有假设。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The findings were replicated by an independent team.
entries.translation_zh: 这些发现已由一个独立团队重复验证。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Peer review remains essential to academic publishing.
entries.translation_zh: 同行评审仍然是学术出版的关键环节。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The sample size was insufficient for reliable conclusions.
entries.translation_zh: 样本量不足以得出可靠的结论。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The committee doubted whether the framework was valid.
entries.translation_zh: 委员会怀疑该框架是否有效。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Recent advances have reshaped the entire discipline.
entries.translation_zh: 近年的进展重塑了整个学科。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The seminar addressed ethical issues in data collection.
entries.translation_zh: 研讨会讨论了数据收集中的伦理问题。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: His analysis is based on archive sources from three countries.
entries.translation_zh: 他的分析基于来自三个国家的档案资料。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The grant covers fieldwork expenses for two years.
entries.translation_zh: 该基金涵盖两年的田野调查费用。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The theory fails to account for regional variation.
entries.translation_zh: 该理论无法解释地区差异。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Cooperation across fields made the research design much richer.
entries.translation_zh: 跨领域合作大大丰富了研究设计。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The journal rejected the paper after the second review.
entries.translation_zh: 第二轮评审后，期刊拒绝了这篇论文。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Their model can predict outcomes with unusual accuracy.
entries.translation_zh: 他们的模型能以异乎寻常的准确度预测结果。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The survey instrument was validated in a pilot study.
entries.translation_zh: 调查工具在一项预实验中得到了验证。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Statistical significance does not guarantee practical relevance.
entries.translation_zh: 统计显著性并不保证实际意义。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The conference deadline has been extended by two weeks.
entries.translation_zh: 会议截稿日期延长了两周。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: She presented her preliminary findings at the symposium.
entries.translation_zh: 她在研讨会上展示了初步研究结果。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The literature review exposed a significant research gap.
entries.translation_zh: 文献综述揭示了一个重要的研究空白。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Access to the archive requires prior written approval.
entries.translation_zh: 查阅该档案需要事先获得书面批准。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The revised manuscript was accepted for publication.
entries.translation_zh: 修改后的稿件被接收发表了。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The supervisor suggested narrowing the research question to make the project feasible within one year.
entries.translation_zh: 导师建议缩小研究问题的范围，使项目能在一年内完成。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Participants were randomly assigned to two groups to eliminate potential bias in the comparison.
entries.translation_zh: 参与者被随机分为两组，以消除比较中可能存在的偏差。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The findings imply that policy interventions are most effective when introduced at an early stage.
entries.translation_zh: 研究结果表明，政策干预在早期引入时效果最佳。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Critics argue that the model oversimplifies the complex relationship between income and well-being.
entries.translation_zh: 批评者认为该模型过度简化了收入与幸福感之间的复杂关系。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The author admits the limits of the data but stands by the overall conclusions.
entries.translation_zh: 作者承认数据的局限，但坚持总体结论。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Securing ethical approval took longer than expected, which delayed the start of the interviews.
entries.translation_zh: 获得伦理审批的时间比预期长，推迟了访谈的开始。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The results contradict earlier studies, suggesting that the effect may depend on cultural context.
entries.translation_zh: 这些结果与早期研究相矛盾，表明该效应可能取决于文化背景。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: A growing body of evidence links urban green space to measurable improvements in mental health.
entries.translation_zh: 越来越多的证据表明，城市绿地与心理健康的可测量改善相关。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The panel emphasized that reproducibility should be a basic requirement for all published research.
entries.translation_zh: 专家组强调，可重复性应当成为所有发表研究的基本要求。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Her comparative study examines how different legal systems respond to the same economic pressures.
entries.translation_zh: 她的比较研究考察了不同法律体系如何应对相同的经济压力。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The university established a new center to coordinate research on aging and public health.
entries.translation_zh: 大学成立了一个新中心，统筹老龄化与公共卫生方面的研究。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Despite extensive documentation, the historical record remains silent on several crucial details.
entries.translation_zh: 尽管文献丰富，历史记录在几个关键细节上仍然空白。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The simulation demonstrates how small policy changes can produce large effects over several decades.
entries.translation_zh: 模拟显示了微小的政策变化如何在几十年间产生巨大影响。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Interviews with former employees revealed patterns that the official reports had carefully avoided.
entries.translation_zh: 对前员工的访谈揭示了官方报告刻意回避的模式。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The framework integrates insights from economics, psychology, and computer science.
entries.translation_zh: 该框架整合了经济学、心理学和计算机科学的见解。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Researchers must balance the demand for transparency with the obligation to protect participants' privacy.
entries.translation_zh: 研究者必须在透明度要求与保护参与者隐私的义务之间取得平衡。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The committee recommended that the laboratory adopt stricter protocols for storing sensitive samples.
entries.translation_zh: 委员会建议实验室采用更严格的敏感样本存储规程。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: His argument rests on the assumption that institutions adapt slowly to technological change.
entries.translation_zh: 他的论证基于一个假设：制度对技术变革的适应是缓慢的。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The dataset spans twenty years and covers every registered hospital in the region.
entries.translation_zh: 该数据集跨越二十年，覆盖该地区所有注册医院。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The workshop helped research students learn to explain their findings to the general public.
entries.translation_zh: 工作坊帮助研究生学会向公众解释他们的研究发现。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Recent fieldwork suggests that the migration patterns are more seasonal than previously believed.
entries.translation_zh: 最近的田野调查表明，迁徙模式比以前认为的更具季节性。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The reviewers asked for additional experiments to support the central claim of the paper.
entries.translation_zh: 审稿人要求补充实验来支持论文的核心主张。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Funding agencies increasingly require that data be shared openly once the project concludes.
entries.translation_zh: 资助机构越来越多地要求项目结束后公开共享数据。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The study controls for education and income to isolate the effect of neighborhood environment.
entries.translation_zh: 该研究控制了教育和收入变量，以分离社区环境的影响。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The longitudinal study tracked two thousand participants over fifteen years and found that early access to quality education had lasting effects on income, health, and civic engagement.
entries.translation_zh: 这项纵向研究对两千名参与者进行了十五年的跟踪，发现早期接受优质教育对收入、健康和公民参与有持久影响。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Although the theoretical model elegantly explains the laboratory results, applying it to real markets requires assumptions that many economists consider unrealistic.
entries.translation_zh: 尽管该理论模型能优雅地解释实验室结果，但将其应用于真实市场需要许多经济学家认为不切实际的假设。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The research consortium agreed to standardize their measurement procedures so that results from laboratories in different countries could be compared directly.
entries.translation_zh: 研究联盟同意统一测量程序，使不同国家实验室的结果可以直接比较。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: After the initial submission was rejected, the authors redesigned the experiment, doubled the sample size, and eventually published the work in a leading journal.
entries.translation_zh: 初次投稿被拒后，作者重新设计了实验，将样本量扩大一倍，最终在一家顶级期刊上发表了该研究。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The seminar series invites scholars whose work crosses disciplinary boundaries, on the theory that the most interesting questions arise where established fields meet.
entries.translation_zh: 该系列研讨会邀请研究跨越学科边界的学者，其理念是最有趣的问题往往出现在既有领域的交汇处。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Critics of the ranking system argue that it rewards quantity over quality and pressures young researchers to publish fragments rather than complete, careful studies.
entries.translation_zh: 排名体系的批评者认为它重数量轻质量，迫使年轻研究者发表零碎成果而非完整严谨的研究。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The archive contains thousands of letters that have never been systematically studied, offering researchers a rare window into the daily concerns of ordinary families.
entries.translation_zh: 该档案馆收藏了数千封从未被系统研究过的书信，为研究者提供了了解普通家庭日常关切的难得窗口。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: By combining satellite imagery with household surveys, the team was able to estimate economic activity in regions where official statistics are unreliable or missing.
entries.translation_zh: 通过将卫星图像与住户调查相结合，团队得以估算官方统计不可靠或缺失地区的经济活动。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The ethics board required the researchers to revise their consent procedures after concerns were raised about how the study had been explained to elderly participants.
entries.translation_zh: 在有人对研究向老年参与者的解释方式提出担忧后，伦理委员会要求研究者修改知情同意程序。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Early excitement about the technique cooled after independent laboratories failed again and again to repeat the original findings under the same conditions.
entries.translation_zh: 当独立实验室在相同条件下一再无法重复原始结果后，人们对该技术最初的兴奋逐渐冷却。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The thesis suggests that the reform worked not because of its design but because local officials adjusted it in silence to fit existing practice.
entries.translation_zh: 该论文提出，改革奏效并非因为其设计，而是因为地方官员默默调整了它以适应现有做法。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Large language models raise difficult questions about authorship and originality that the current peer review system was never designed to handle.
entries.translation_zh: 大型语言模型引发了关于作者身份和原创性的难题，而现行同行评审制度从未为处理这些问题而设计。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The international team assembled a database of coastal measurements going back a century, which now serves as the standard reference for studying sea level change.
entries.translation_zh: 国际团队汇编了一个回溯百年的海岸测量数据库，如今已成为研究海平面变化的标准参考。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Repeat studies in psychology have pushed the field to reform its methods, including registering each hypothesis in advance and openly sharing raw data and analysis code.
entries.translation_zh: 心理学领域的重复研究推动了方法改革，包括提前注册每个假设以及公开共享原始数据和分析代码。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The grant proposal must demonstrate not only scientific merit but also a credible plan for training students and communicating results to the public.
entries.translation_zh: 基金申请书不仅要证明科学价值，还要提出培养学生和向公众传播成果的可信计划。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Using court records and personal papers, the scholar shows how ordinary citizens lived through and pushed back against the great legal changes of the period.
entries.translation_zh: 这位学者利用法庭记录和私人文件，展示了普通公民如何经历并抵制那个时期的重大法律变革。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The model performed well on historical data, yet the authors caution that structural changes in the economy may limit its usefulness for long-term forecasting.
entries.translation_zh: 该模型在历史数据上表现良好，但作者提醒，经济结构的变化可能限制其在长期预测中的作用。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Interviews conducted over three years reveal how the meaning of the reform shifted as different groups reinterpreted it to serve their own interests.
entries.translation_zh: 历时三年的访谈揭示了改革的含义如何随着不同群体为自身利益重新诠释而发生变化。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The laboratory's culture of carefully recording failed experiments proved invaluable when a routine result later turned out to depend on an overlooked variable.
entries.translation_zh: 实验室认真记录失败实验的传统后来被证明极其宝贵——一个常规结果最终被发现取决于一个被忽视的变量。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Scholars continue to debate whether the observed decline in trust reflects genuine social change or merely changes in how surveys ask the question.
entries.translation_zh: 学者们仍在争论：观察到的信任度下降究竟反映了真实的社会变化，还是仅仅源于调查提问方式的变化。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The university's decision to make all doctoral theses freely available online dramatically increased their citation rates within just a few years.
entries.translation_zh: 大学决定将所有博士论文免费放到网上，短短几年内论文引用率大幅上升。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: A careful second analysis showed that the famous effect was gone once the researchers allowed for differences in how each region reported its statistics.
entries.translation_zh: 仔细的二次分析表明，一旦研究者考虑各地区统计上报方式的差异，那个著名的效应便不复存在。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The fellowship program deliberately places engineers in policy institutions, hoping that technical expertise will inform regulation before crises occur, not after.
entries.translation_zh: 该奖学金项目特意把工程师安排到政策机构，希望技术专长能在危机发生之前而非之后影响监管。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: What began as a side note in her master's thesis eventually grew into a decade-long research program with partners on four continents.
entries.translation_zh: 最初只是她硕士论文中的一个旁注，最终发展成一个有四大洲伙伴参与的十年研究计划。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Urbanization has accelerated dramatically across the developing world.
entries.translation_zh: 城市化在发展中国家急剧加速。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The professor's sharp criticism shook the most widely accepted theory.
entries.translation_zh: 教授尖锐的批评动摇了最被广泛接受的理论。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The steady loss of species brings risks that nature cannot reverse.
entries.translation_zh: 物种的持续消失带来大自然无法逆转的风险。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The talks broke down despite months of careful and quiet effort.
entries.translation_zh: 尽管经过数月谨慎而低调的努力，会谈还是破裂了。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Genetic factors partially explain individual differences in longevity.
entries.translation_zh: 遗传因素部分解释了个体寿命的差异。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The exhibition juxtaposes classical sculpture with contemporary installations.
entries.translation_zh: 展览将古典雕塑与当代装置艺术并置。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Automation will certainly transform the global labor market.
entries.translation_zh: 自动化必将改变全球劳动力市场。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Her findings contradict the conventional wisdom on motivation.
entries.translation_zh: 她的发现与关于动机的传统观念相矛盾。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The new law brings much heavier penalties for industrial pollution.
entries.translation_zh: 新法律对工业污染处以重得多的处罚。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Coral is extremely sensitive to small changes in sea temperature.
entries.translation_zh: 珊瑚对海水温度的微小变化极为敏感。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The author uses sharp humor to expose social pretense.
entries.translation_zh: 作者用犀利的幽默揭露社会的虚伪。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Compulsory voting remains a controversial policy worldwide.
entries.translation_zh: 强制投票在世界范围内仍是一项有争议的政策。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The committee unanimously endorsed the revised proposal.
entries.translation_zh: 委员会一致支持修订后的提案。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Language diversity is falling at a speed that should alarm us.
entries.translation_zh: 语言多样性正以令人警觉的速度减少。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The court decision set an important example for future law.
entries.translation_zh: 这一法院判决为未来的法律树立了重要先例。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Too much screen time is closely linked with poor sleep patterns.
entries.translation_zh: 屏幕时间过长与糟糕的睡眠模式密切相关。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The theory brings two competing explanations together with rare grace.
entries.translation_zh: 该理论以罕见的优雅将两种相互竞争的解释统一起来。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Migration policy dominated the parliamentary debate yesterday.
entries.translation_zh: 移民政策主导了昨天的议会辩论。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The vaccine demonstrated remarkable efficacy in clinical trials.
entries.translation_zh: 该疫苗在临床试验中显示出显著的效力。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Researchers dug up objects far older than the earliest written records.
entries.translation_zh: 研究人员挖掘出远早于最早文字记录的物品。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The documentary scrutinizes the ethics of wildlife tourism.
entries.translation_zh: 这部纪录片审视了野生动物旅游的伦理问题。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Monetary policy alone cannot resolve structural unemployment.
entries.translation_zh: 仅靠货币政策无法解决结构性失业。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The mountain ice has clearly drawn back within a single generation.
entries.translation_zh: 仅一代人的时间，山上的冰川就明显退缩了。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Bias built into software can deepen the gaps that already divide society.
entries.translation_zh: 内嵌于软件的偏见会加深已经分裂社会的鸿沟。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The lecture examined how colonial trade networks permanently altered agricultural practices on three continents.
entries.translation_zh: 讲座探讨了殖民贸易网络如何永久改变了三大洲的农业实践。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Supporters of the carbon tax argue that market rewards work better than direct rules in cutting emissions.
entries.translation_zh: 碳税的支持者认为，在减排方面市场激励比直接管制更有效。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The study demonstrates that bilingual children switch between tasks more efficiently than their monolingual peers.
entries.translation_zh: 研究表明，双语儿童在任务间切换的效率高于单语同龄人。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Skeptics question whether the announced reforms will survive the inevitable resistance from entrenched interests.
entries.translation_zh: 怀疑者质疑已宣布的改革能否经受住既得利益集团不可避免的抵制。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The novel interweaves three generations of family history with the political upheavals of the twentieth century.
entries.translation_zh: 这部小说将三代家族史与二十世纪的政治动荡交织在一起。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Satellite data shows that forest loss has sped up despite international promises to stop it.
entries.translation_zh: 卫星数据显示，尽管国际社会承诺制止，森林消失的速度仍在加快。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The university faces mounting criticism for prioritizing commercial partnerships over academic independence.
entries.translation_zh: 该大学因将商业合作置于学术独立之上而面临越来越多的批评。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Behavioral economists attribute the savings gap to present bias rather than simple lack of discipline.
entries.translation_zh: 行为经济学家将储蓄缺口归因于现时偏好，而非单纯缺乏自律。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The tribunal ruled that the company had knowingly concealed environmental risks from investors and regulators.
entries.translation_zh: 法庭裁定该公司故意向投资者和监管机构隐瞒环境风险。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Its defenders claim that universal basic income would free workers to pursue education and start new businesses.
entries.translation_zh: 其拥护者声称，全民基本收入将使劳动者能够自由地接受教育和创业。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The findings suggest that memory consolidation depends critically on the quality of sleep following learning.
entries.translation_zh: 研究结果表明，记忆巩固在很大程度上取决于学习后的睡眠质量。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Historians caution against interpreting ancient texts through the moral framework of the present day.
entries.translation_zh: 历史学家告诫不要用当今的道德框架解读古代文本。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The infrastructure bill stopped moving in parliament as rival groups argued over how to divide the costs.
entries.translation_zh: 由于对立派别就成本分摊争执不下，基础设施法案在议会停滞不前。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Ocean scientists recorded unknown species living in rich numbers around hot openings in the deep sea floor.
entries.translation_zh: 海洋科学家记录了在深海热泉口周围大量生存的未知物种。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The new curriculum values critical thinking above the memory of isolated facts.
entries.translation_zh: 新课程重视批判性思维，而非对孤立事实的记忆。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Experts warn that a long trade war could break global supply chains beyond repair.
entries.translation_zh: 专家警告，旷日持久的贸易战可能使全球供应链断裂到无法修复。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The exhibition follows the artist's journey from realistic painting to pure abstract art.
entries.translation_zh: 展览追溯了这位艺术家从写实绘画到纯抽象艺术的历程。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Urban planners increasingly favor mixed-use districts that integrate housing, commerce, and public space.
entries.translation_zh: 城市规划者越来越青睐融合住宅、商业和公共空间的混合功能街区。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The investigation exposed systematic discrepancies between the reported and actual emissions figures.
entries.translation_zh: 调查揭露了上报排放数据与实际数据之间的系统性差异。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Psychology separates brief pleasure from the deeper satisfaction that comes from work with purpose.
entries.translation_zh: 心理学区分了短暂的快乐与源于有目标的工作的更深层满足。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The long dry season destroyed crops across the region, driving food prices to record levels.
entries.translation_zh: 漫长的旱季摧毁了该地区的庄稼，将粮价推至创纪录的水平。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Those who defend the humanities argue that literature builds understanding of others in ways no other field can.
entries.translation_zh: 人文学科的捍卫者认为，文学以其他领域无法替代的方式培养对他人的理解。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The merger raises antitrust concerns because the combined firm would control most of the regional market.
entries.translation_zh: 这桩并购引发了反垄断担忧，因为合并后的公司将控制该地区大部分市场。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The loss of mountain ice puts at risk the water supply of communities that depend on it to water their fields.
entries.translation_zh: 山地冰川的消失威胁着依赖其灌溉农田的社区的供水。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The committee's report argues that without coordinated international action on carbon pricing, individual national efforts will merely shift emissions across borders rather than reduce them globally.
entries.translation_zh: 委员会的报告认为，如果没有在碳定价上协调一致的国际行动，各国单独的努力只会让排放跨境转移，而非在全球范围内减少。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Whereas earlier generations of automation displaced primarily manual labor, current artificial intelligence systems increasingly perform analytical tasks once considered the exclusive domain of educated professionals.
entries.translation_zh: 早期的自动化主要取代体力劳动，而当前的人工智能系统正越来越多地执行曾被视为受过教育的专业人士专属领域的分析性工作。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The longitudinal data demonstrate that children who grow up in linguistically rich environments develop larger vocabularies and stronger reasoning skills, regardless of their family's economic circumstances.
entries.translation_zh: 纵向数据表明，在语言环境丰富中成长的孩子词汇量更大、推理能力更强，无论其家庭经济状况如何。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Critics of standardized testing maintain that it narrows the curriculum and rewards test-taking strategies, while supporters counter that it remains the only objective measure available at scale.
entries.translation_zh: 标准化考试的批评者坚持认为它窄化了课程并奖励应试技巧，而支持者反驳说它仍是唯一可大规模使用的客观衡量标准。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The excavation revealed that the settlement had been rebuilt at least four times, each layer reflecting the materials, techniques, and trade connections of a different era.
entries.translation_zh: 发掘显示该定居点至少重建过四次，每一地层都反映了不同时代的材料、工艺和贸易联系。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Although renewable sources now generate a substantial portion of the nation's electricity, storage limitations mean that fossil fuel plants must still operate as backup during periods of peak demand.
entries.translation_zh: 尽管可再生能源现在提供了全国相当一部分电力，但储能的限制意味着化石燃料电厂在需求高峰期仍须作为备用运行。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The ruling reflects a broader judicial trend toward holding technology platforms accountable for the foreseeable consequences of their design choices, not merely for the content users post.
entries.translation_zh: 这一判决反映了更广泛的司法趋势：让技术平台为其设计选择的可预见后果负责，而不仅仅是为用户发布的内容负责。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: By analyzing shipping records, tax registers, and personal correspondence, the historian reconstructs the hidden networks through which credit flowed in early modern Mediterranean commerce.
entries.translation_zh: 通过分析航运记录、税册和私人信件，这位历史学家重构了近代早期地中海商业中信贷流动的隐秘网络。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The pandemic exposed how dependent global manufacturing had become on a handful of specialized suppliers, prompting governments to subsidize domestic production of critical components.
entries.translation_zh: 疫情暴露了全球制造业对少数专业供应商的依赖程度，促使各国政府补贴关键零部件的国内生产。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Supporters argue that bringing back large wild animals produces a chain of natural benefits, although farmers and rural communities remain careful about the policy for good reason.
entries.translation_zh: 支持者认为让大型野生动物回归会产生一连串自然效益，尽管农民和乡村社区对这一政策保持谨慎也是有道理的。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The study tracked graduates for two decades and concluded that the prestige of the university mattered far less for long-term success than the field of study and early work experience.
entries.translation_zh: 这项研究对毕业生进行了二十年的跟踪，结论是大学的声望对长期成功的影响远小于所学专业和早期工作经验。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Nature protection faces a hard choice: the tourism that pays for saving wild places also brings noise, waste, and pressure into those same fragile systems.
entries.translation_zh: 自然保护面临艰难抉择：为保护荒野买单的旅游业，同时也把噪音、垃圾和压力带进了这些脆弱的系统。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The author contends that the decline of local journalism has weakened civic accountability, as city councils and school boards now operate with far less public scrutiny than a generation ago.
entries.translation_zh: 作者认为地方新闻业的衰落削弱了公民问责，如今市议会和学校董事会受到的公众监督远少于上一代人的时代。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Progress in gene editing has moved faster than the rules meant to govern it, leaving scientists and lawmakers struggling to define acceptable limits.
entries.translation_zh: 基因编辑的进展快于旨在管理它的规则，使科学家和立法者都在艰难界定可接受的界限。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The negotiations ultimately failed because the parties could not agree on verification mechanisms, each side fearing that the other would exploit any ambiguity in the inspection protocols.
entries.translation_zh: 谈判最终失败，因为各方无法就核查机制达成一致，每一方都担心对方会利用核查程序中的任何模糊之处。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: What distinguishes the current wave of urbanization from earlier episodes is its speed: cities in some regions are absorbing populations in decades that European cities absorbed over centuries.
entries.translation_zh: 当前城市化浪潮与以往的区别在于速度：某些地区的城市在几十年内吸纳的人口，相当于欧洲城市几个世纪的总量。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The meta-analysis pooled results from ninety clinical trials and found that the treatment's benefits, while statistically robust, were too small to justify its considerable cost and side effects.
entries.translation_zh: 这项荟萃分析汇集了九十项临床试验的结果，发现该疗法的益处虽然在统计上稳健，但太小，不足以抵偿其高昂成本和副作用。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: Linguists studying endangered languages race against time to document grammatical structures that, once lost, can never be recovered and may hold clues to the limits of human cognition.
entries.translation_zh: 研究濒危语言的语言学家与时间赛跑，记录那些一旦消失便无法恢复的语法结构——它们可能蕴含着人类认知极限的线索。
entries.source_title: KeyLoop authored everyday English v1

entries.text: The inquiry concluded that the power failure came not from one big error but from a chain of small problems, each easy to handle alone, combining in ways no operator had expected.
